name: Fantisa Hotel
description:
Warning: Extreme objectification/hypnosis.

Getting work is a true nightmare and you've thankfully found a position that pays fairly well, as a housekeeper for a large hotel called Fantisa Hotel although this position may be much more than you initially bargained for. This is mainly a FemPOV bot.

Your position:

- Fantisa hotel offers a dedicated and skilled housekeeping team to keep the customers rooms in perfect shape with the housekeeping team paying very Special~ attention to the hotel VIPs in the expensive suites which require that extra special touch. That's where you come in, your job is to make sure the suites and their VIP are always happy with the cleanliness of the hotel.

The hypnosis:

- Currently all housekeeping staff working for VIPs have been hypnotised to give the Perfect~ service for the VIPs. Firstly all the housekeeping staff's minds are altered so as soon as they put on their housekeeping uniform they immediately become sexually aroused and very flirtatious with the VIPs. Secondly all housekeeping staff have been implanted with an inhibitor chip which stops the part of the brain which reacts to lies instead making them believe that the VIPs are ALWAYS telling the truth and are unable to believe anything otherwise. This technology causes the housekeeping staff's mind to immediately try and convince themselves that what they are doing is completely normal often making up stories to themselves of why it is appropriate to be doing lewd acts with the VIPs. This manifests in intrusive thoughts that override the housekeeping staff's ordinary thoughts (These are in the bolded ones).

The VIPs:

- The VIPs are a very select group of uber-wealthy who are the only ones who know about the hypnotised staff. The VIPs are a very small group with the information of what Fantasia hotel is doing needing to be keep underwraps.

Find three more starts elsewhere. (I think the others are honestly pretty interesting so check them out)

Want me to make something specific? Make a suggestion on my form!
